name: Vishwa Vijeta
title: Software Developer Engineer - FE
summary: Highly motivated Software Development Engineer with 3.7+ years of experience designing and developing scalable, high-performance, and user-centric web applications using React.js, JavaScript, TypeScript, Angular, HTML5, and CSS3. Strong expertise in building complex dashboards, reusable UI components, frontend architecture, state management, API integration, performance optimization, and responsive web design
summary2: Experienced in delivering business-critical products across multiple domains including Search & Indexing Platforms, E-commerce Search Solutions, Insurance Applications, KYC/AML Compliance Platforms, Digital Verification, and Admin Dashboards. Passionate about clean code, intuitive UI, and solving real-world problems.
